saturday.notes: Four routes available — pick your distance!

runs.label: Track Night
runs.workout:
1mi warmup at 6:30pm (arrive earlier for longer warmup)
6:40pm we begin intervals
4x800 (400m rest or 3 min)
Broken mile (400@10k, 400@5k, 400@5k-10s, 400 AFAYC - 100m jog between each 400)
1mi cooldown

Modified:
2x800
Broken mile (400@10k, 400@5k, 400@5k-10s, 400 AFAYC - 100m jog between each 400)

runs.label: Special Event
runs.notes: A loop around Hopewell/Sourlands, ending with some wine!  Families welcome.  Winery opens at noon, so this allows for about a 90 minute run.
